--- 
title: "Higher Apps Bookdown"
author: "A James"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
output: bookdown::bs4_book
documentclass: book
classoption: openany
bibliography: [book.bib, packages.bib]
biblio-style: apalike
mainfont: Times New Roman
fontsize: 11pt
link-citations: 
header-includes:
- \AtBeginDocument{\frontmatter}
description: |
  Notes, examples and exercises to support the Higher Apps course.
---

# Course Information {-}
